name: Chocolate Toffee Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1/4 cup brown sugar and margarine. Stir in 1/2 cup flour. Press firmly and evenly into the bottom of a square dish, 8 X 8 X 2 inches. Place the dish on an inverted dinner plate in the microwave oven.
2. Microwave uncovered on medium (50%) for 4 to 6 minutes, rotating the dish 1/4 turn after 2 minutes. Let stand uncovered about 5 minutes until the mixture appears almost dry.
3. Mix egg, 1/2 cup brown sugar, 1 tablespoon flour, baking powder, vanilla, and salt. Stir in chocolate chips and nuts. Spread over the cooked layer. Microwave uncovered on medium (50%) for 7 to 10 minutes, rotating the dish 1/4 turn every 3 minutes until the top begins to lose glossiness. Cover loosely and let stand about 5 minutes.
4. Prepare Chocolate Glaze: Place cocoa, margarine, and water in a 2-cup measure. Microwave uncovered on high for 20 to 30 seconds or until the margarine is melted; stir. Mix in powdered sugar until smooth.
5. Drizzle chocolate glaze over the top. Cut into about 2 X 1-1/4-inch bars. Refrigerate for about 30 minutes or until the chocolate is firm. (24 BARS, 105 CALORIES PER BAR.)
